commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Slack block-action approval handling to authorize plugin approval buttons with Slack plugin approvers, adds explicit plugin gateway resolution for unprefixed fallback, and adds regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. we have a high-confidence source reproduction path: current main uses the exec approver helper for the Slack plugin approval button authorization variable, while docs and native approval tests keep plugin approval authorization separate. I did not establish a live Slack reproduction in this read-only review.
